data.title: Palantir Delivers AI-Powered Battle Stations To US Army, Stock Now Comparable To Tesla Circa 2015: Analyst
data.description: Palantir delivered $178 million TITAN military deal to U.S. Army with AI tech and subcontractors. Stock up 204% in 12 months.

data.title: Dingdong Rallies 13.4% Following Q4 Earnings Announcement
data.description: Dingdong Stock rallied 13.4% after its latest quarterly announcement, even as the company set a cautionary tone for 2025.

data.title: Nasdaq Plans 24-Hour Trading To Tap Global Investor Demand
data.description: Nasdaq plans to enable 24-hour trading in 2026, pending regulatory approval. Risks include volatility and lower liquidity during overnight hours.

data.title: Bristol Myers' Opdivo Plus Yervoy Combo Therapy Secures European Approval For Untreated Liver Cancer Patients
data.description: The European Commission approved Opdivo plus Yervoy for first-line treatment of advanced liver cancer, citing significant overall survival benefits.
